notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package describes an open battle scene (方源 and 巨阳仙僵 attacking 天庭仙墓, 星宿仙尊 defending). All events are publicly observable combat actions. No private knowledge, secret plans, future-known information, or knowledge gaps are directly supported by the source text. The entities and relations are all visible battlefield positions. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculating beyond what the source directly supports.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed describes battle actions (方源 and 巨阳仙僵 attacking the formation, 星宿仙尊 defending) but does not provide direct evidence of any character's internal motives. Observed actions are military conflict, but inferring motive (e.g., '方源 wants to break the formation to weaken Heavenly Court') would be a psychological leap beyond what the seed directly supports. Only behavior is visible; motive is ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed describes a direct battle/conflict between individuals (方源, 巨阳仙僵, 星宿仙尊) and mentions 天庭 as a faction, but the pressure is a single ongoing battle event rather than a sustained faction pressure axis. 天庭 appears as a named faction in relations (方源 vs 天庭), but the seed facts focus on the immediate battle at 天庭仙墓 with individual combatants. No clear faction-level pressure axis (interest, threat, resource, reputation, geography, succession, inheritance) is concretely established beyond the immediate conflict. The battle is already in progress, so 'likely reactions' like investigate/monitor don't fit. Would need additional seed context to derive a meaningful faction pressure candidate.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
